Hardware Component File

BMS48V_HHN_330.xml

System Identification and Configuration Data

Metadata

File reference BMS48V_HHN_R330_20211103T163945.json
Source type JSON Data Array
Status
Validated

Technical Warning

Ensure specific OBD protocol matching before hardware implementation to avoid controller lockout.

Safety Guidelines →

OBD Configuration Details

Protocol CAN
Baudrate 10400
Send ID 18DA92F1
Receive ID 18DAF192
Functional Addr 92
Functional Name BMS Master
